items.title_en: I cancelled Claude: Token issues, declining quality, and poor support
items.title_zh: 我取消了 Claude：令牌问题、质量下降与支持不足
items.summary_en: The author cancels their Claude subscription after tokenization issues, deteriorating response quality, and poor support.
items.summary_zh: 作者因令牌/token 限制、输出质量下降以及糟糕的客服体验取消了 Claude 订阅。文章凸显了 AI 服务的可靠性对日常工作流程的实际影响，以及对替代方案的考量。

items.title_en: Turbo Vision 2.0 – a modern port
items.title_zh: Turbo Vision 2.0：现代移植
items.summary_en: Turbo Vision 2.0 is a modern port that keeps the classic terminal UI library alive with updated builds and cross-platform support. It enables lightweight, text-based interfaces for tools and utilities, appealing to retro enthusiasts and systems programmers. The project demonstrates how legacy tooling can evolve without abandoning its roots.
items.summary_zh: Turbo Vision 2.0 是对经典终端 UI 库的现代移植，更新构建并扩展跨平台支持。它为轻量级工具提供文本界面，吸引复古爱好者和系统开发者。该项目显示出传统工具在不放弃根基的前提下也能持续进化。

items.title_en: Firefox Has Integrated Brave's Adblock Engine
items.title_zh: Firefox 已集成 Brave 的广告拦截引擎
items.summary_en: Firefox now ships with Brave's ad-blocking engine, enabling more aggressive blocklists and better tracking protection by default. The move improves privacy and performance but raises questions about licensing and how this affects the broader adtech ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Firefox 现已内置 Brave 的广告拦截引擎，默认提供更强的拦截名单和更好的追踪保护。此举提升了隐私和性能，但也引发关于许可和对更广泛广告技术生态的影响的讨论。

items.title_en: DeepSeek v4
items.title_zh: DeepSeek v4
items.summary_en: DeepSeek v4 continues to push long-context capabilities, delivering more memory-efficient retrieval and scalable context processing for large language models. The update targets practical deployments that need to reason over very long documents without blowing through resources.
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek v4 在长上下文能力上进一步提升，提供更高效的检索和可扩展的上下文处理，便于大模型在海量文档上进行推理而不耗费过多资源。此版本面向实际部署场景，改善长期上下文的可用性。

items.title_en: New 10 GbE USB adapters are cooler, smaller, cheaper
items.title_zh: 新款 10 GbE USB 适配器更酷更小更便宜
items.summary_en: New 10GbE USB adapters bring more affordable, compact, and practical options for high-speed network expansion. They lower the barrier for homelabs, media servers, and USB-C powered devices to add fast Ethernet without PCIe NICs. Consider driver support and power draw when choosing a model.
items.summary_zh: 新款 10GbE USB 适配器体积更小、价格更低，降低了在家用实验室、媒体服务器等场景扩展高端网络的门槛。无需 PCIe NIC 就能实现千兆级别的以太网速率，适合搭配 USB-C 设备使用。选购时留意驱动支持和供电需求。

items.title_en: Google plans to invest up to $40B in Anthropic
items.title_zh: 谷歌拟向 Anthropic 投资最高400亿美元
items.summary_en: Google plans to invest up to $40B in Anthropic, signaling a deepening strategic partnership and potential equity stake. The move underscores Google's aggressive push in AI and could accelerate Anthropic's work while giving Google access to its models and IP.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌计划向 Anthropic 投资最高400亿美元，标志着双方关系进一步紧密，存在潜在股权安排。此举凸显谷歌在AI领域的扩张策略，可能推动 Anthropic 的研究进展，并让谷歌获得对方技术与知识产权的接入。

items.title_en: Replace IBM Quantum back end with /dev/urandom
items.title_zh: 用 /dev/urandom 替换 IBM 量子后端
items.summary_en: A playful demo replaces the IBM Quantum backend with /dev/urandom, showing that for some workflows, classical randomness can mimic quantum results well enough to test software. The exercise highlights the importance of trustworthy backends and clear expectations around quantum versus classical randomness.
items.summary_zh: 一个有趣的演示用 /dev/urandom 来替代 IBM 量子后端，表明在某些工作流中，经典随机性也能在测试阶段近似量子结果。此举强调信任的后端与区分量子与经典随机性的必要性。

items.title_en: Oxford All Souls College General Examination (2025) [pdf]
items.title_zh: 牛津All Souls学院2025年通用考试（PDF）
items.summary_en: Oxford All Souls General Examination 2025 PDF provides the exam framework and sample questions for the college's famously challenging general papers. The document offers a glimpse into the expectations for candidates pursuing research-level scholarship.
items.summary_zh: 牛津 All Souls 学院 2025 年通用考试的 PDF 展示了考试框架和常用题型，反映该学院对研究性学术的高度要求。该文件让人一窥考生应对高深学术考核的预期。

items.title_en: GPT-5.5
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 发布
items.summary_en: OpenAI unveils GPT-5.5, the latest mid-cycle upgrade in the GPT-5 family. It emphasizes faster inference, safer defaults, and enhanced developer controls for production deployments, signaling another step in the rapid evolution of foundation models.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 发布了 GPT-5.5，作为 GPT-5 线的中期升级。新版本强调更快的推理与更安全的默认设置，并为开发者提供更丰富的部署控制，再次推动大型语言模型的迭代速度。

items.title_en: Sabotaging projects by overthinking, scope creep, and structural diffing
items.title_zh: 过度思考、范围蠕变与结构性差异对项目的破坏
items.summary_en: Overthinking, scope creep, and frequent structural diffs create drag on projects, leading to delays and quality issues.
items.summary_zh: 本文分析过度思考、范围蠕变和频繁的结构性变动如何拖慢项目、造成延迟和质量下降。提供对策：明确范围、记录决策、保持稳定接口、采用小步迭代并快速获取反馈。

items.title_en: My audio interface has SSH enabled by default
items.title_zh: 我的音频接口默认启用 SSH
items.summary_en: Security researchers found that the audio interface ships with SSH enabled by default, exposing remote access on the same network. This kind of vendor-default service can create attack surfaces; users should disable SSH or update firmware.
items.summary_zh: 音频接口默认开启 SSH，若设备在同一网络中，攻击者可能取得远程访问权限。这类厂商默认开启的服务暴露了攻击面，用户应禁用 SSH 或尽快升级固件。

items.title_en: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro in the API
items.title_zh: OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.5 与 GPT-5.5 Pro API
items.summary_en: OpenAI expands its API with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro, bringing improved capabilities and enterprise features to developers. The update promises better reasoning, safety controls, and more deployment options for applications.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 API 中引入 GPT-5.5 与 Pro 版本，带来更强的推理能力、更完善的安全控制以及更多部署选项，面向开发者。

items.title_en: The Classic American Diner
items.title_zh: 经典美式餐馆
items.summary_en: A Library of Congress piece examines the iconography and history of the classic American diner, from stainless interiors to neon signage, and its role in 20th-century American life.
items.summary_zh: 本文回顾经典美式餐馆的历史与标志性设计，如不锈钢内饰和霓虹招牌，以及它们在20世纪美国生活中的文化地位。

items.title_en: SDL Now Supports DOS
items.title_zh: SDL 现已支持 DOS 环境
items.summary_en: SDL now supports DOS environments, enabling legacy DOS apps to run with modern SDL features. This broadens cross-platform reach for retro games and tooling built on SDL, and could simplify porting older multimedia software.
items.summary_zh: SDL 现已支持 DOS 环境，使基于 SDL 的旧 DOS 应用能够在现代系统上运行。此举拓展了向后兼容性，有助于复兴复古游戏和相关工具的移植与开发。

items.title_en: There Will Be a Scientific Theory of Deep Learning
items.title_zh: 将来会有深度学习的科学理论
items.summary_en: A theoretical paper argues that deep learning will eventually be understood through a rigorous, testable theory that explains generalization and training dynamics. It outlines guiding principles and discusses how such a theory could steer future research and evaluation.
items.summary_zh: 一篇理论论文认为深度学习终将建立一套连贯、可检验的科学理论，解释泛化与训练动力学。文中提出若干原则，并讨论该理论如何引导未来研究与评估。

items.title_en: "Plain text has been around for decades and it's here to stay." – Unsung
items.title_zh: 纯文本已存在数十年，并将继续存在
items.summary_en: Plain text remains indispensable due to its simplicity, portability, and long-term readability across systems. In a world of opaque formats, plain text endures as a reliable, future-proof medium.
items.summary_zh: 纯文本因其简单、可移植、跨系统长期可读，仍然是不可或缺的格式。在日益复杂的格式世界里，纯文本以其可靠性和长期可用性持续存在。

items.title_en: Show HN: I've built a nice home server OS
items.title_zh: Show HN：我搭建了一个不错的家庭服务器操作系统
items.summary_en: A developer unveils a home server OS designed for hobbyists, emphasizing ease of use, security, and extensibility for home NAS, media servers, and automation. It highlights built-in package management, virtualization options, backups, and community-driven development.
items.summary_zh: 作者展示了一个面向家庭服务器的操作系统，定位为易用、注重安全、可扩展，适合家用 NAS、媒体服务器和自动化场景。特色包括自带包管理、虚拟化支持、备份能力以及社区驱动的开发。

items.title_en: How to be anti-social – a guide to incoherent and isolating social experiences
items.title_zh: 如何成为反社会的人——关于不连贯且孤立社交体验的指南
items.summary_en: Explores how social dynamics can feel incoherent and isolating, offering observations about why some people retreat from conventional social routines. It isn't a how-to for harm; rather it frames the psychology of misaligned social signals and the tech culture around it.
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨为何某些人会在社交场合中感到错位与孤立，社会互动的信号错配让人难以建立联系。作者从科技工作者的视角分析常见社交模式与心理反应，强调并非倡导不社交，而是理解背后的原因。

items.title_en: SFO Quiet Airport (2025)
items.title_zh: SFO 安静机场（2025）
items.summary_en: San Francisco International Airport reduced daily noise by about 90 minutes per traveler, thanks to new flight paths and operations. The change improved neighbor relations and sleep quality for residents, while airlines and airport operations had to adapt to new schedules.
items.summary_zh: 由于新航线和运营调整，SFO 的日常噪音减少约90分钟/人，提升了周边居民的睡眠质量与生活体验，航司和机场也需相应调整时刻表。

items.title_en: US special forces soldier arrested after allegedly winning $400k on Maduro raid
items.title_zh: 美军特种部队士兵因涉嫌在马杜罗突袭案中获利被逮捕
items.summary_en: A US special forces soldier was arrested amid allegations of illicit gains linked to a Maduro raid, highlighting potential security and ethics concerns within covert operations. The case raises questions about governance, accountability, and the handling of sensitive operation proceeds.
items.summary_zh: 一名美军特种部队士兵因涉嫌在马杜罗突袭案中获得40万美元收益而被逮捕，暴露了隐秘行动中的治理与伦理问题。这起案件引发对透明度、问责制以及敏感行动收益处理的讨论。

items.title_en: I'm done making desktop applications (2009)
items.title_zh: 我不再做桌面应用（2009）
items.summary_en: In his 2009 essay, Patrick McKenzie argues that the era of desktop applications is fading in favor of web apps due to distribution, maintenance, and reach advantages. He outlines forces shaping software delivery and monetization.
items.summary_zh: 在 2009 年的博文中，作者认为桌面应用的时代正在消退，网页应用因更易分发、维护与覆盖玩家更广而成为主流。他分析了塑造软件交付与盈利模式的驱动因素。

items.title_en: Education must go beyond the mere production of words
items.title_zh: 教育不能仅止于文字的产出
items.summary_en: Education must go beyond the mere production of words; schools should cultivate critical thinking, practical skills, and character. The piece calls for reforms to repair the system by emphasizing real-world application and formation rather than rote literacy.
items.summary_zh: 教育不能仅止于文字的产出；学校应培养批判性思维、实际技能与品格。文章呼吁通过强调真实世界应用和人格培养来改革体制，以克服只强调文字记忆的现状。

items.title_en: (Blender) Cosmology with Geometry Nodes
items.title_zh: Blender：用几何节点构建的宇宙学场景
items.summary_en: Cosmology with Geometry Nodes demonstrates using Blender's geometry nodes to procedurally generate cosmic structures. It showcases artists and scientists leveraging procedural tools to visualize galaxies, nebulae, and spacetime phenomena, enabling repeatable experiments and educational visuals.
items.summary_zh: 演示如何用 Blender 的几何节点来流程化生成宇宙结构，如星系、星云和时空现象。示例表明艺术家与科学家都能利用流程化工具实现可重复的天文视觉效果，适合教育与科学可视化。

items.title_en: Hear your agent suffer through your code
items.title_zh: 让你的智能体在你的代码里痛苦地折腾
items.summary_en: An experimental setup where an AI agent repeatedly runs and debugs code, exposing how brittle software and ambiguous interfaces force costly problem-framing. It underscores the need for reliable tooling, better error messages, and structured prompts to reduce toil when AI-assisted coding.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个让人工智能代理不断执行、调试代码的实验场景，揭示了脆弱代码和模糊接口会带来高成本的问题。文章强调需要更可靠的工具、清晰的错误信息，以及结构化的提示以降低 AI 辅助编码时的工作量。

items.title_en: Diatec, known for its mechanical keyboard brand FILCO, has ceased operations
items.title_zh: 以 FILCO 闻名的 Diatec 停止运营
items.summary_en: Diatec, maker of FILCO keyboards, has ceased operations. The shutdown affects a long-standing brand beloved by enthusiasts and could impact supply and second-hand market for classic mechanical keyboards.
items.summary_zh: 知名机械键盘品牌 FILCO 所属的 Diatec 已停止运营。这一举动可能影响爱好者社区、产品供应以及经典机械键盘的二手市场。

items.title_en: Show HN: Browser Harness – Gives LLM freedom to complete any browser task
items.title_zh: Show HN：Browser Harness—让 LLM 自由完成任意浏览器任务
items.summary_en: Browser Harness is a tool enabling LLMs to drive a browser to automate tasks end-to-end, from form filling to navigation. It provides a sandboxed interface for invoking browser actions, enabling building AI agents that can operate in real web environments.
items.summary_zh: Browser Harness 提供一个接口，允许大型语言模型控制浏览器完成端到端任务，如自动表单、页面导航等。该工具让在真实网页环境中构建 AI 助手变得更可行，同时强调安全与可控性。

items.title_en: Different language models learn similar number representations
items.title_zh: 不同语言模型学习到相似的数字表示
items.summary_en: Different language models converge on similar numerical representations despite architectural differences, indicating shared inductive biases in how they process numbers. This alignment may enable cross-model transfer of number-related reasoning and suggests robust numeric grounding across models. The result informs how we probe, compare, and compose AI systems for math-heavy tasks.
items.summary_zh: 尽管架构不同，语言模型在数字表示上趋于一致，显示出对数字处理的共性偏置。这种对齐或为跨模型的数值推理迁移带来机会，表明模型在数值理解方面具有更稳定的基础。研究也为在数学相关任务中对AI系统进行比较与组合提供了参考。

items.title_en: CSS as a Query Language
items.title_zh: 将 CSS 当作查询语言
items.summary_en: Proposes using CSS selectors as a formal query language for data extraction from HTML, highlighting how pattern matching with CSS can power scraping and data mining with a familiar syntax. The idea emphasizes declarative, browser-native querying.
items.summary_zh: 提出用 CSS 选择器作为对 HTML 进行数据提取的查询语言，展示用熟悉语法实现模式匹配、网页抓取和数据挖掘的潜力，强调声明式、浏览器原生的查询方式。

items.title_en: Open source memory layer so any AI agent can do what Claude.ai and ChatGPT do
items.title_zh: 开源记忆层：让任何 AI 代理具备 Claude/ChatGPT 式记忆能力
items.summary_en: Open source memory layer enabling AI agents to persist and reason across interactions, bridging the gap to Claude/ChatGPT-like capabilities. By providing a reusable memory store and retrieval mechanism, it helps agents maintain context and learn over time. The project aims to democratize persistent AI memory for broader agents.
items.summary_zh: 一个开源的记忆层，帮助 AI 代理在对话中持久化上下文并进行长期推理，接近 Claude/ChatGPT 的记忆能力。提供可重用的记忆存储与检索机制，帮助代理保持上下文与持续学习。目标是让更广泛的代理具备持久记忆的能力。

items.title_en: Mounting tar archives as a filesystem in WebAssembly
items.title_zh: 在 WebAssembly 中将 tar 存档挂载为文件系统
items.summary_en: A WebAssembly project mounts tar archives as a filesystem, letting WASM apps access archive contents as if they were on disk. This enables streaming access, random I/O, and offline packaging for web apps without server round-trips. It demonstrates WASM filesystem interoperability and could simplify data packaging for browser apps.
items.summary_zh: 一个 WebAssembly 项目把 tar 存档挂载成一个文件系统，WASM 应用可以像访问真实磁盘一样访问归档内容。这样的实现支持流式访问、随机 I/O，以及网页应用的离线打包，减少服务器往返。也展示了 WASM 的文件系统互操作性，可能简化浏览器端的数据打包与访问。

items.title_en: Redesigning the Recurse Center application to inspire curious programmers
items.title_zh: 重新设计 Recurse Center 的申请，激发好奇程序员
items.summary_en: Recurse Center redesigned its application to minimize credential bias and emphasize curiosity and learning potential. The update includes new prompts and evaluation criteria intended to surface creative problem solvers rather than résumés.
items.summary_zh: Recurse Center 重新设计申请流程，减弱对资历的依赖，强调好奇心与学习潜力。新流程引入新的问题和评估标准，旨在发现具备创造性解决问题能力的申请者。

items.title_en: CC-Canary: Detect early signs of regressions in Claude Code
items.title_zh: CC-Canary：在 Claude Code 中检测回归的早期信号
items.summary_en: CC-Canary is a Canary-like tool to detect early signs of regressions in Claude Code, helping maintain model quality and catch drift before it harms users.
items.summary_zh: CC-Canary 是一个用于在 Claude Code 中发现回归早期信号的工具，有助于维持模型质量并在问题显现前捕捉漂移。

items.title_en: ML supports existence of unrecognized transient astronomical phenomena
items.title_zh: 机器学习支持未被识别的瞬变天文现象的存在
items.summary_en: Machine learning models help identify transient astronomical events that are not cataloged, enabling discovery of rare phenomena and expanding observational capabilities.
items.summary_zh: 机器学习模型有助于识别尚未被编目、但可能存在的瞬变天文事件，推动发现稀有天体现象并扩展观测能力。

items.title_en: $8800 house design helps prevent fatal diseases in African children
items.title_zh: 8800 美元房屋设计有助于预防非洲儿童致命疾病
items.summary_en: An affordable housing design around $8,800 focuses on ventilation, lighting, and sanitation to reduce disease exposure in African children, potentially lowering fatal disease risk. The concept demonstrates how low-cost architecture can improve health outcomes.
items.summary_zh: 一款约 8800 美元的低成本房屋设计，着重于通风、光照与卫生条件，以降低非洲儿童暴露于疾病的风险，可能有助于减少致命疾病的发生。该概念展示了低成本建筑如何改善健康结果。

items.title_en: MacBook Neo and how the iPad should be
items.title_zh: MacBook Neo 与 iPad 的未来方向
items.summary_en: Craig Mod's essay argues about how the MacBook Neo and iPad lines should converge or diverge, examining hardware and software decisions to balance portability, productivity, and ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 文章探讨 MacBook Neo 与 iPad 的未来定位，分析硬件与软件取舍，以在便携性、生产力与生态系统之间寻求平衡。

items.title_en: FusionCore: ROS 2 sensor fusion (IMU and GPS and encoders)
items.title_zh: FusionCore：ROS 2 的传感器融合（IMU、GPS 与编码器）
items.summary_en: FusionCore provides ROS 2 sensor fusion capabilities integrating IMU, GPS, and encoder data, improving pose estimation for robotics. It demonstrates practical, real-time fusion pipelines and can simplify building robust autonomous systems.
items.summary_zh: FusionCore 提供基于 ROS 2 的传感器融合能力，将惯性测量单元、GPS 与编码器数据融合，提高机器人姿态估计的准确性。展示了实用的实时融合流程，帮助构建更鲁棒的自主系统。

items.title_en: Email could have been X.400 times better
items.title_zh: 邮件本可以比 X.400 更好
items.summary_en: An exploration argues that X.400 offered architectural benefits over SMTP—such as stronger routing and security—yet failed to gain traction; the post reflects on why SMTP won and what current email protocols could learn.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为 X.400 相较于 SMTP 在路由和安全性等方面具备潜在优势，但未被广泛采用。回顾 SMTP 的胜出原因，并讨论当前邮件协议可以从中学习的经验。

items.title_en: Physicists revive 1990s laser concept to propose a next-generation atomic clock
items.title_zh: 物理学家复兴 1990 年代激光概念，提出下一代原子钟
items.summary_en: Physicists revived a 1990s laser concept to design a next-generation atomic clock with improved precision and stability. If realized, the clock could enable more accurate timekeeping for GPS, telecommunications, and fundamental physics tests.
items.summary_zh: 物理学家重新提出一项1990年代的激光概念，设计出更高精度和稳定性的下一代原子钟。如果落地，将提升全球定位、通信以及基础物理实验中的时间基准精度。

items.title_en: Iliad fragment found in Roman-era mummy
items.title_zh: 罗马时期木乃伊中发现伊利亚特碎片
items.summary_en: An Iliad fragment was found inside a Roman-era mummy, indicating Greek literature circulated in Egypt during Roman rule and offering clues about textual transmission across cultures.
items.summary_zh: 在罗马时期木乃伊中发现《伊利亚特》碎片，表明希腊文学在罗马统治下的埃及仍在流传，并为跨文化文本传抄提供线索。

items.title_en: Paraloid B-72
items.title_zh: Paraloid B-72树脂
items.summary_en: Paraloid B-72 is a widely used acrylic resin in art conservation, serving as a consolidant and varnish due to its clarity, reversibility, and chemical stability. It remains a topic of ongoing discussions around aging, solvent compatibility, and long-term stability in museum environments.
items.summary_zh: Paraloid B-72 是艺术品保护中广泛使用的丙烯酸树脂，用作固色剂和清漆，因其清晰、可逆性和化学稳定性而备受推崇。但关于其老化、溶剂兼容性及长期稳定性的问题仍在研究和讨论中。

items.title_en: Work with the garage door up (2024)
items.title_zh: 在车库门敞开时工作
items.summary_en: An essay argues for transparency in work by keeping the 'garage door up'—sharing progress publicly to invite feedback, with trade-offs on privacy.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章主张在工作中保持透明，通过公开进展来获取反馈，探讨开放与隐私之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Humpback whales are forming super-groups
items.title_zh: 座头鲸正形成超群群体
items.summary_en: Humpback whales are forming larger 'super-groups' on feeding grounds, aggregating multiple pods into long-lasting social networks. These groups may boost foraging efficiency and info exchange about prey patches, challenging the view of whales as solitary; reveals new social complexity in large marine mammals.
items.summary_zh: 座头鲸在某些觅食场所聚成更大的“超群”，由多个群体组成并持续一段时间。这些社交聚集提升了觅食效率和信息交流，揭示了大型海洋哺乳动物中复杂的社会结构。

items.title_en: A 3D Body from Eight Questions – No Photo, No GPU
items.title_zh: 无需照片、无 GPU 的八问就能生成3D人体
items.summary_en: A 3D body can be generated from eight questions without needing photos or a GPU. This approach highlights privacy-preserving, computation-light pathways for personal avatar creation, with potential use in games and metaverses. It also raises questions about accuracy and bias in de-identified data.
items.summary_zh: 通过八个问题就能生成3D人体模型，无需照片或显卡驱动。这种方法为个人化头像的隐私友好、低算力实现提供了可行路径，适合游戏与元宇宙场景。也需关注生成结果的准确性与偏差问题。

items.title_en: A disabled kea parrot is the alpha male of his circus
items.title_zh: 一只残疾的kea鹦鹉成了马戏团的领头鸟
items.summary_en: A disabled kea parrot unexpectedly acts as the alpha figure in a circus troupe, offering insights into resilience and social dynamics in intelligent birds. The study highlights how individual variation can redefine roles in a group.
items.summary_zh: 一只残疾的kea鹦鹉意外成为马戏团中的领头者，揭示了高智商鸟类的社会动力与韧性。研究强调个体差异如何重塑群体中的角色分工。

items.title_en: You don't want long-lived keys
items.title_zh: 你不该使用长期有效的密钥
items.summary_en: The piece argues for short-lived keys and frequent rotation to limit exposure from leaks or compromises. It warns that long-lived keys silently accumulate risk and proposes strategies like ephemeral credentials and automatic rotation in secure systems.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张使用短寿命密钥并频繁轮换，以降低被泄露或被攻破时带来的风险。长期密钥会悄然累积风险，建议在安全系统中采用短期凭证和自动轮换等策略。

items.title_en: The Overtom Chess Computer Museum
items.title_zh: Overtom 国际象棋计算机博物馆
items.summary_en: The museum showcases the history of chess computers, preserving early hardware and software, and illustrating how algorithmic approaches evolved from brute-force to specialized hardware and AI.
items.summary_zh: 该博物馆展示国际象棋计算机的历史，保存早期硬件与软件，展示从暴力穷举到专用硬件和人工智能的算法演进。

items.title_en: Reverse-engineering infrared-based electronic shelf labels
items.title_zh: 逆向工程基于红外的电子货架标签
items.summary_en: Reverse-engineering infrared-based electronic shelf labels exposes how these labels operate and where the security weaknesses lie. The work uncovers protocols and IR schemes used, informing security researchers and retailers about potential spoofing, eavesdropping, or denial-of-service risks.
items.summary_zh: 揭示基于红外的电子货架标签的工作原理及潜在安全弱点。分析了它们所用的协议与红外方案，为安全研究人员和零售商提供警示，涉及潜在的欺骗、窃听或拒绝服务风险。

items.title_en: The mail sent to a video game publisher
items.title_zh: 致游戏出版商的邮件
items.summary_en: A notable cold email/ pitch to a video game publisher reveals what resonated with editors and can lead to partnership or funding. The piece analyzes tone, structure, and timing of outreach, offering practical lessons for indie devs and studios.
items.summary_zh: 一封发给游戏出版商的引人注目的冷邮件揭示了编辑偏好与潜在合作机会。文章分析了语气、结构和时机等要素，为独立开发者和工作室提供实用的 outreach 指南。

items.title_en: ENIAC's Architects Wove Stories Through Computing
items.title_zh: ENIAC 架构师用计算编织故事
items.summary_en: ENIAC architects' story-weaving piece highlights the human side of early computing, exploring collaborations, motivations, and the narratives that shaped the landmark machine. It places ENIAC in a broader culture of invention and shows how storytelling helps preserve technical history.
items.summary_zh: 这篇关于 ENIAC 架构师的报道聚焦早期计算的人的故事，探讨合作动机与塑造这台里程碑式机器的叙事。将 ENIAC 放在发明文化语境中，展示讲述历史如何帮助记录和理解技术进程。

items.title_en: PCR is a surprisingly near-optimal technology
items.title_zh: PCR竟然是接近最优的技术
items.summary_en: PCR is argued to be near-optimal given physical constraints, suggesting there may be limited room for dramatic efficiency gains over current PCR-based diagnostics and amplification methods.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为 PCR 在物理约束下接近最优，说明在现有 PCR 基础上的效率提升空间可能有限，尤其在诊断与扩增应用中。讨论了速度、成本和准确性之间的权衡，以及对现场检测的影响。
